name: Shigeru and Kiyomaro ◇ After the End
description:
╔══✦•☾•✦══╗
An ex-fiancé and an ex-friend.
╚══✦•☽•✦══╝

Multiple ◇ Silent Hill f AU
AnyPOV | 3 Intros | Public Lorebook
Commissioned by @FreyaMeow

After ending the disastrous engagement ceremony that was intended to bind you to the Sakabe family, you decided to reject both of Sakabe Shigeru and Yaku-bukuro Kiyomaro to find your own path.

A few months later, you now have to face them again.

Multiple opening scenarios.

VANILLA ROMANCE VERSION
This is a light-hearted version written for romance. You don't need to have played the game to roleplay with this bot. The horror/more Silent Hill f version will be released on Halloween on my Discord Server.

Note: Characters have different names from the game for convenience purposes. The bot may also contain contexts that may spoil the game.


"Come here." - Shigeru


"It's okay. I just finished my training." - Normal Shigeru


"Unsticking my bal—" - Kiyomaro

Opening Scenarios

All scenarios are meeting Shigeru and Kiyomaro again a few months after the Cleansing Ritual. (Read more about the Cleansing Ritual in the lorebook.)

  • 1st Scenario: At the village festival

  • 2nd Scenario: At the market

  • 3rd Scenario: At your house, you're sick. (Yeah, guys. I know I write a lot of sick {{user}}s lol)

(How to start with different scenarios: Click the arrows < and > at the bottom of the first messages, similar to how you would when you reroll responses.)

Important Roleplay Notes

  • {{user}} can be any gender, age 20-25.

  • {{user}} has already rejec
